name: How is fault decided in work ladder fall cases?
description: Comp no-fault; fault matters for extra lawsuits only.

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in work ladder fall cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp no-fault; fault matters for extra lawsuits only.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Workers' comp ignores fault**—no-fault system; employer/third-party negligence separate.[2][3]

Comp pays regardless; sue others for extras.

- Ladder defects? Product liability.
- GC violation? Labor law.[3]

Fault only reduces third-party recovery.
